use_cases: Interactive hero section background with physics-based bouncing balls animation
Landing page decorative element with mouse-following particle effects
Creative portfolio showcase with customizable colorful particle system
Web app loading or ambient animation layer
ai_summary: A canvas-based particle animation system featuring physics simulation with configurable gravity, bounce damping, and friction. Balls respond to mouse interaction within a defined radius, supporting both click-driven repulsion and cursor-following behavior. Fully customizable through props for particle count, colors, size range, speed, and trail opacity effects. Designed as a visually engaging, performant background or decorative element for modern web applications.
